query:
-- Insert 5 diverse service profiles for testing niche-specific script generation

-- Service 1: Executive Leadership Coach (women in corporate)
INSERT INTO services (
  userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price,
  totalCustomers, averageRating, totalReviews,
  whyProblemExists, hvcoTopic, mechanismDescriptor, applicationMethod,
  avatarName, avatarTitle
) VALUES (
  1,
  'The Executive Edge',
  'coaching',
  'Leadership coaching for women executives seeking VP and C-suite promotions',
  'Women in senior director roles at Fortune 500 companies who are consistently passed over for VP promotions despite strong performance',
  'Get promoted to VP within 12 months by mastering sponsor advocacy and executive presence',
  9997.00,
  200,
  4.9,
  87,
  'Corporate promotion systems favor male executives who self-promote aggressively, while women wait to be recognized for their work',
  'How to secure VP promotions without waiting for recognition',
  'Framework',
  'Strategic self-advocacy and sponsor cultivation',
  'Sarah Chen',
  'Former Fortune 500 CHRO'
);

-- Service 2: Dog Reactivity Trainer
INSERT INTO services (
  userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price,
  totalCustomers, averageRating, totalReviews,
  whyProblemExists, hvcoTopic, mechanismDescriptor, applicationMethod,
  avatarName, avatarTitle
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Calm Canine Protocol',
  'coaching',
  'Science-backed dog reactivity training for leash-reactive dogs',
  'Dog owners whose dogs lunge, bark, or snap at other dogs during walks, making daily walks stressful and embarrassing',
  'Transform your reactive dog into a calm walker who passes other dogs without pulling or barking',
  1497.00,
  1200,
  4.8,
  340,
  'Most trainers use punishment-based methods that increase fear and worsen reactivity over time',
  'How to rewire your dog''s brain to replace fear with focus',
  'Method',
  'Counter-conditioning and desensitization protocols',
  'Dr. Emma Rodriguez',
  'Certified Applied Animal Behaviourist'
);

-- Service 3: Crypto Day Trader Coach
INSERT INTO services (
  userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price,
  totalCustomers, averageRating, totalReviews,
  whyProblemExists, hvcoTopic, mechanismDescriptor, applicationMethod,
  avatarName, avatarTitle
) VALUES (
  1,
  'The Funded Trader Blueprint',
  'coaching',
  'Prop trading mentorship for retail crypto traders seeking consistent funded account withdrawals',
  'Crypto day traders who pass prop firm challenges but lose their funded accounts within 2 weeks due to poor risk management',
  'Consistently withdraw 5-figure monthly payouts from funded accounts without blowing up',
  4997.00,
  340,
  4.7,
  156,
  'Retail traders use retail strategies that work in demo but fail with real capital and psychological pressure',
  'How top prop traders manage risk to survive funded account evaluations',
  'Blueprint',
  'Institutional risk management protocols',
  'Marcus Chen',
  '7-Year Prop Desk Trader'
);

-- Service 4: Wedding Photographer Business Coach
INSERT INTO services (
  userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price,
  totalCustomers, averageRating, totalReviews,
  whyProblemExists, hvcoTopic, mechanismDescriptor, applicationMethod,
  avatarName, avatarTitle
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Premium Wedding Photography Accelerator',
  'coaching',
  'Business coaching for wedding photographers ready to book $8,000+ weddings',
  'Wedding photographers stuck at $1,800-$3,000 bookings who want to break into the luxury wedding market',
  'Book $8,000+ weddings consistently without competing on price or working weekends as a second shooter',
  2997.00,
  180,
  4.9,
  92,
  'Most photographers compete on price instead of positioning themselves as luxury brands that attract high-budget clients',
  'How luxury wedding photographers command premium rates',
  'System',
  'Premium positioning and client attraction',
  'Jessica Martinez',
  'Luxury Wedding Photographer Since 2017'
);

-- Service 5: Postpartum Fitness Coach
INSERT INTO services (
  userId, name, category, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit, price,
  totalCustomers, averageRating, totalReviews,
  whyProblemExists, hvcoTopic, mechanismDescriptor, applicationMethod,
  avatarName, avatarTitle
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Strong Mama Method',
  'coaching',
  'Postpartum fitness coaching for mothers 3-18 months after delivery',
  'New mothers whose core and pelvic floor feel disconnected, making everyday movements like lifting their baby or walking feel difficult',
  'Rebuild core strength and pelvic floor function so you feel strong and confident in your body again',
  997.00,
  500,
  4.8,
  267,
  'Most postpartum fitness programs ignore pelvic floor recovery and push women back into high-impact exercise too soon',
  'How to rebuild your core and pelvic floor safely after pregnancy',
  'Method',
  'Progressive pelvic floor and core restoration',
  'Dr. Rachel Kim',
  'Pelvic Floor Physiotherapist'
);
